info.title: Threema Broadcast API
info.description: API for managing Threema Broadcast identities, bots, distribution lists, feeds, groups, and messaging.

get.description: Retrieve all bots for a broadcast identity.

post.description: Create a new bot for a broadcast identity.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific bot.

delete.description: Delete a bot (requires state to be 'deleted').

put.description: Set a bot to active or deleted state.

get.description: List all commands for a bot.

post.description: Create a new command for a bot.

get.description: Get details of a specific bot command.
List all distribution lists for a broadcast identity.
Get details of a specific distribution list.

delete.description: Delete a distribution list (requires state to be 'deleted').

get.description: Get chat history for a distribution list.

post.description: Send a message to a distribution list.

get.description: Get details of a specific message in a distribution list.

delete.description: Delete a message from a distribution list.

get.description: Get delivery statistics for a message.
List recipients of a distribution list.

post.description: Add recipients to a distribution list.

delete.description: Remove recipients from a distribution list.

get.description: List all feeds for a broadcast identity.
Get details of a specific feed.
List all groups for a broadcast identity.
Get details of a specific group.
Get chat history for a group.

post.description: Send a message to a group.

get.description: Get details of a broadcast identity.

apiKeyHeader.name: X-API-Key
apiKeyHeader.description: API key created in Threema Broadcast settings

recipients.description: Array of Threema IDs to remove
